setPreSignature(bytes,bool).details: Caller must be the order owner. Order must be submitted to CoW API separately.

params.orderUid: The unique identifier of the order (56 bytes: digest + owner + validTo)
params.signed: True to enable the order for trading, false to revoke

domainSeparator().notice: Domain separator for EIP-712 order signing

setPreSignature(bytes,bool).notice: Pre-sign an order for CoW Protocol
